# .github/skills/

Drop project-local skills here as `<skill-name>/SKILL.md` directories.

Skills are on-demand workflows with bundled assets (scripts, templates, references).
The `description` field IS the discovery surface — without trigger phrases in it, no agent
will ever load the skill.

Discover community skills:

    npx skills search <term>
    npx skills add <skill-id>

Sources: https://skills.sh, https://github.com/anthropics/skills, https://github.com/github/awesome-copilot
